BlockerConfig._comment_BlockedDays: Days when all blocked apps are killed. Valid values: Sunday Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday
BlockerConfig._comment_AllowedTimeWindows: Optional: allow apps during these hours even on blocked days. Format: HH:mm:ss. Leave empty to block all day.
BlockerConfig._comment_JavaProcessKeywords: Substrings matched against javaw.exe command line. Catches Java-based games without killing IDEs.
BlockerConfig._comment_ProcessPathKeywords: Substrings matched against each process ExecutablePath. Add any folder or exe name fragment. Case-insensitive.
BlockerConfig._comment_TimeZoneId: Windows timezone ID for schedule evaluation. Run 'tzutil /l' for valid IDs.
BlockerConfig._comment_FreeDayDailyLimitMinutes: Shared daily limit in minutes across ALL blocked apps on free days (0 = unlimited). Resets at Eastern midnight.
